names: SIGNED AND DECLARED by the above named GAMINI WICKRAMASINGHE as
for his LAST WILL And TESTAMENT in the presence of us the Undersigned Witnesses who in his presence
in the presence of one another all being present together at the same time have subscribed our names hereto as attesting witnesses.

executors.name: I DO HEREBY NOMINATE CONSTITUTE AND APPOINT my beloved MALLIKA WICKRAMASINGHE (holder of National Identity Card No. 487654321V) of the same address to be the sole of this my LAST WILL
authority as are required or allowed in Law.
